description: Multi-agent code review swarm capstone. Claude Code / Cowork sessions on this repo should treat src/agents/*.py as the authoritative agent definitions and src/pipeline.py as the orchestration graph.
notes: Default CODEGUARD_MODE=mock so the suite runs without credentials.
Set CODEGUARD_MODE=live and export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to exercise real Claude calls with the flag_finding tool.
sample_data/pr_*/pr.json files are the fixed acceptance-criterion fixtures — deny-listed from casual edits; change deliberately if you update tests/test_acceptance.py to match.
